81: The sultana was until recently at the very forefront of our efforts to forestall the catastrophes threatening this star. In my capacity as captain of the Sultansworn, it was my duty to accompany Her Grace both here in Ul'dah and abroad on official business.

85:
An odd question to come from one so accomplished! But if you wish to hear my words once more, I will oblige.


A true paladin is one who bends his knee to a higher cause, and offers his sword and shield without promise of reward.
